---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Abhishu"
format: revealjs
---


```{r}
# packages and libraries
 library(tidyverse)
 library(ggplot2)

# data
load('SED.RData')
 
# limit to my region of CENTRO, ARG
 df <- data_sdi |>
   filter(region_name == 'CENTRO')
```

# analysis slide

```{r}
# graph dem by region over time

df|>
ggplot( 
  aes( x= year, y= SUR_index_sub_exe , colour = state_name)
  ) +
geom_line() +
theme_minimal()


```
